# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that creates releases and publishes packages. On version tags, build the application, create a GitHub release, and publish to npm/PyPI. Make the release process fully automated so developers can just push tags to trigger releases.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Release Workflow

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - 'v*'

jobs:
  build-and-publish:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Set up Node.js (for npm)
      if: github.repository.endsWith('.js') or github.repository.endsWith('frontend')
      uses: actions/setup-node@v2
      with:
        node-version: '14'

    - name: Install dependencies and build
      run: |
        npm install
        npm run build

    - name: Set up Python (for PyPI)
      if: github.repository.endsWith('.py') or github.repository.endsWith('backend')
      uses: actions/setup-python@v2
      with:
        python-version: '3.8'

    - name: Install dependencies and build
      run: |
        python -m venv venv
        source venv/bin/activate
        pip install -r requirements.txt
        python setup.py sdist bdist_wheel

    - name: Create release
      id: create_release
      uses: actions/create-release@v1
      env:
        GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      with:
        tag_name: ${{ github.ref }}
        release_name: Release ${{ github.ref }}
        body: |
          Changes in this Release
        draft: false
        prerelease: false

    - name: Upload release asset (npm)
      if: github.repository.endsWith('.js') or github.repository.endsWith('frontend')
      uses: actions/upload-release-asset@v1
      env:
        GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      with:
        upload_url: ${{ steps.create_release.outputs.upload_url }}
        asset_path: ./path/to/your/npm/package.tgz
        asset_name: package.tgz
        asset_content_type: application/gzip

    - name: Upload release asset (PyPI)
      if: github.repository.endsWith('.py') or github.repository.endswith('backend')
      uses: actions/upload-release-asset@v1
      env:
        GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      with:
        upload_url: ${{ steps.create_release.outputs.upload_url }}
        asset_path: ./dist/*
        asset_name: package.whl
        asset_content_type: application/octet-stream

    - name: Publish to npm
      if: github.repository.endsWith('.js') or github.repository.endsWith('frontend')
      run: |
        npm publish --access public

    - name: Publish to PyPI
      if: github.repository.endsWith('.py') or github.repository.endswith('backend')
      uses: pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish@release/v1
      with:
        user: __token__
        password: ${{ secrets.PYPI_API_TOKEN }}
